title: The National Co-operative Development Corporation Act, 1962
full_text: The National Co-operative Development Corporation Act, 1962 राष्‍ट्रीय सहकारी विकास निगम अधिनियम, 1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196226 Act Number: 26 Enactment Date: 1962-08-31 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The National Co-operative Development Corporation Act, 1962 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय सहकारी विकास निगम अधिनियम, 1962 Long Title: An Act to provide for the incorporation and regulation of a corporation for the purpose of planning and promoting programmes for the production, processing, marketing, storage, export and import of agricultural produce, foodstuffs industrial goods, livestock, certain other commodities and services on co-operative principles and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare Enforcement Date: 14-03-1963 Notification: 14th March, 1963, vide notification No. G.S.R. 456, dated 14th March, 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The National Co-operative Development Corporation Act, 1962 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 2A. Construction of references to any law not in force or any functionary not existence in the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Section 3. Establishment of the National Co-operative Development Corporation. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Disqualifications for being a member of Corporation. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Term of office of members of Corporation. Section 6. Removal from office of member, etc. Section 7. Meetings, etc., of Corporation. Section 8. Officers and other employees of Corporation. Section 9. Functions of Corporation. Section 10. Board of Management of the Corporation. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Other committees. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Grants by the Central Government to Corporation. Section 12A. Power of Corporation to borrow money. Show Related Subordinates Section 12B. Grants, donations, etc. Section 13. Corporation to maintain fund. Section 14. Returns and reports. Section 15. Directions by Central Government. Section 16. Submission of programme of activities and financial estimates. Section 17. Accounts of Board and audit. Section 18. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate acts and proceedings of the Corporation. Section 19. Delegation. Section 20. Declaration of fidelity and secrecy. Section 21. Dissolution of Corporation. Section 22. Power to make rules. Section 23. Power of Corporation to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Repeal and saving. Schedule 1.
